name: Hawckeye
description: Run Hawckeye (security, QA, product-friction) against a deployed env or APK after deploy. Results go to your dashboard, Linear, and email.
helpMarkDown: Set a secret variable HAWKEYE_API_KEY. Requires a Linux agent with bash/curl/jq.
author: Hawckeye

inputs.name: environmentUrl
inputs.label: Environment URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Freshly-deployed env to scan (web). Use this OR assetId OR apk.

inputs.name: assetId
inputs.label: Asset id
inputs.helpMarkDown: Use this OR environmentUrl OR apk.

inputs.name: apk
inputs.label: APK path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Use this OR environmentUrl OR assetId.

inputs.name: waitForUrl
inputs.label: Wait for env to be live
inputs.helpMarkDown: Poll environmentUrl until live before scanning.

inputs.name: versionPath
inputs.label: Version path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path returning the deployed sha, e.g. /version.
